zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Legh II於大約1325年出生在英國爾阿德林頓時，他的父親Robert Legh20歲，母親Sybil de Honeford21歲。他於大約1359年與Matilda d'Arderne在英國英格蘭爾阿德林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1382年11月9日在英國英格蘭爾阿德林頓享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿德林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Legh II于大约1325年出生在英国爾阿德林頓时，他的父亲Robert Legh20岁，母亲Sybil de Honeford21岁。他于大约1359年与Matilda d'Arderne在英国英格兰爾阿德林頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1382年11月9日在英国英格兰爾阿德林頓享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾阿德林頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Legh II was born about 1325, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, his father, Robert Legh, was 20 and his mother, Sybil de Honeford, was 21. He married Matilda d'Arderne about 1359, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 November 1382, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Adlington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Legh II est né environ 1325, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Legh, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Sybil de Honeford, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Matilda d'Arderne environ 1359, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 novembre 1382, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Adlington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Legh II um 1325 in Adlington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Legh 20 und seine Mutter Sybil de Honeford 21. Er hat um 1359 in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Matilda d'Arderne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. November 1382 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Adlington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Legh II è nato il circa 1325 nel Adlington, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Legh, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Sybil de Honeford, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Matilda d'Arderne circa 1359, nel Adlington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 novembre 1382, nel Adlington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Adlington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Legh IIが約1325年にイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンで生まれた時，父Robert Leghは20歳，母Sybil de Honefordは21歳であった。約1359年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンでMatilda d'Arderneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1382年11月9日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアアドリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Legh II(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 체실르 애들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Legh(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil de Honeford(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1359년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애들링턴에서 Matilda d'Arderne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1382년 11월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애들링턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애들링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Legh II nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Legh, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Sybil de Honeford, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda d'Arderne aproximadamente 1359, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1382, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Adlington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Legh II родился около 1325 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Legh было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Honeford, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda d'Arderne около 1359 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 ноября 1382 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности адлингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Legh II nació aproximadamente 1325, en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Legh, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Sybil de Honeford, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Matilda d'Arderne aproximadamente 1359, en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1382, en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Adlington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
